subcodes.title: Words to Mr Michel and others, spoken on 1915-05-10
subcodes.first_line: When I was travelling in Europe and America I attended some concerts and oratorios and was delighted with the progress of the vocal and instrumental art in those parts... At one time I was walking along the shores of the Euphrates. Absorbed in my thought I suddenly heard
